mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE status = 5 AND DATE(checkout_time) = #{date}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM user WHERE #{date} >= DATE(create_time)

SELECT name, number FROM (SELECT od.name, SUM(od.number) AS number, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(od.number) DESC) AS rn FROM sky_take_out.order_detail AS od JOIN sky_take_out.orders AS o ON od.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = #{status} AND o.order_time > #{begin} AND #{end} >= o.order_time GROUP BY od.name) t WHERE 10 >= rn ORDER BY number DESC;
